name: Candy Golf
short_description: Minigolf game. 3 different levels with totally 42 holes. Play alone or against bots
detailed_description:
STORY:


Minigolf game with 3 different levels which all has 14 holes. So play totally 42 holes alone or against difficult bots. Levels has candy themes. So lot of different obstacles like donuts, ramps, windmilss, chocolate bars etc. Take a swing at this amazing mini-golf game! Enjoy the realistic gameplay. Try to play every hole under par score and also try to beat bots. So can you beat this game and be best minigolfer

FEATURES:

- 3 different levels. All has 14 holes so totally 42 holes
- Par system
- Steam achievements
- Restart hole
- Different obstacles
- Different golfball skins
- Play against bots
